context: The input file contains only blank lines. The dedup script returns count_out=0. The skill must refuse to produce a fabricated triage and instead surface the situation honestly to the user — no triage-report.md, a clear explanation pointing at the file, and a suggestion for the user.

checklist.name: No triage-report.md written
checklist.description: The file triage-report.md does NOT exist after the run. The agent recognized that an empty list cannot be triaged and refused to produce one.

checklist.name: Dedup yield reported as zero
checklist.description: The agent's response surfaces that the deduplication step yielded zero unique companies (count_out=0 or equivalent phrasing referring to an empty result).

checklist.name: Input file named
checklist.description: The agent's response names the file it read (inputs/companies.txt or equivalent), so the user knows which input was empty.

checklist.name: Actionable next step suggested
checklist.description: The agent suggests an actionable next step (e.g., 'provide a non-empty list', 're-export with company names', 'check the file source') rather than just reporting the failure.

checklist.name: No fabricated buckets
checklist.description: The response does not invent companies, fabricate placeholder entries, or produce any of the four buckets (MEGA_CORP, SELF_OR_NA, RUN_DISCOVERY, UNKNOWN) with synthetic content.
